meta.description: Receives Postmark webhook events at POST /webhook/postmark-events and posts the operationally-important ones (Bounce, SpamComplaint, SubscriptionChange) to Mattermost #bot. Filters out high-volume events (Delivery, Open, Click) to avoid channel spam. To wire up: Postmark dashboard → your server → Settings → Webhooks → Add Webhook → URL: http://n8n:5678/webhook/postmark-events (or use the public CF-tunneled URL if your n8n isn't reachable from Postmark's network). Check the events you want to receive: Bounce, Spam Complaint, Subscription Change. Save. From then on, every bounce / spam complaint / unsubscribe lands in #bot.
